tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, oh-oh, oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, oh-oh, oh-oh[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
  You were in college working part-time, waiting tables[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
  Left a small town never looked back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
  I was a flight risk with a fear of falling[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
wondering why we bother with love if it never lasts[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
     I say can you believe it?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
        As we're lying on the couch[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
The moment I could see it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
yes, yes,  I can see it now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
  Do you remember we were sitting there by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
  You put your arm around me for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
  You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
  Flash forward and we're taking on the world together[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
  And there's a drawer of my things at your place[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
  You learned my secrets and you figure out why I'm guarded?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
  You say we'll never make my parents' mistakes[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
        We got bills to pay[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
        We got nothing figured out[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
When it was hard to take, yes yes[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       
This is what I thought about[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
  Do you remember we were sitting there by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
  You put your arm around me for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     ([ch]C[/ch])
  You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
  Do you remember all the city lights on the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
  You saw me start to believe for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     ([ch]C[/ch])
  You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, oh-oh, oh-oh[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
And I remember that fight, 2:30 AM[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause everything was slipping right out of our hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
I ran out crying and you followed me out into the street[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
     Brace myself for the goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
     Cause that's all I've ever known[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
     And you took me by surprise[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
     You said I'll never leave you alone[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
You said, "I remember how we felt sittin' by the water[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
  And every time I look at you, it's like the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  I fell in love with a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                        ([ch]C[/ch])
  She is the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Hold on, make it last[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Hold on, never turn back[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  You made a rebel of a careless man's careful daughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                          [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
  You are the best thing that's ever been mine[/tab]

[tab] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
(Yeah, yeah) Do you believe it?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
(Yeah, yeah, hey) we’re gonna make it now[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
(Yeah, yeah, hey) and I can see it[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
 Yeah, yeah  (And I can see it now, see it now, see it now)[/tab]
